tools.name: alarms.batchAcknowledgeAlarm
tools.description: Acknowledges one or more alarms. The alarms change to the ACKNOWLEDGED state after you acknowledge them.

tools.name: alarms.batchDisableAlarm
tools.description: Disables one or more alarms. The alarms change to the DISABLED state after you disable them.

tools.name: alarms.batchEnableAlarm
tools.description: Enables one or more alarms. The alarms change to the NORMAL state after you enable them.

tools.name: alarms.batchResetAlarm
tools.description: Resets one or more alarms. The alarms return to the NORMAL state after you reset them.

tools.name: alarms.batchSnoozeAlarm
tools.description: Changes one or more alarms to the snooze mode. The alarms change to the SNOOZE_DISABLED state after you set them to the snooze mode.

tools.name: alarms.listAlarms
tools.description: Lists one or more alarms. The operation returns only the metadata associated with each alarm.

tools.name: detectors.batchDeleteDetector
tools.description: Deletes one or more detectors that were created. When a detector is deleted, its state will be cleared and the detector will be removed from the list of detectors. The deleted detector will no longer appear if referenced in the ListDetectors API call.

tools.name: detectors.batchUpdateDetector
tools.description: Updates the state, variable values, and timer settings of one or more detectors (instances) of a specified detector model.

tools.name: detectors.describeDetector
tools.description: Returns information about the specified detector (instance).

tools.name: detectors.listDetectors
tools.description: Lists detectors (the instances of a detector model).

tools.name: inputs.batchPutMessage
tools.description: Sends a set of messages to the IoT Events system. Each message payload is transformed into the input you specify ("inputName") and ingested into any detectors that monitor that input. If multiple messages are sent, the order in which the messages are processed isn't guaranteed. To guarantee ordering, you must send messages one at a time and wait for a successful response.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
